source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/라우터 (Archer C64)/6. Test report/CE RF report_EN 62311&EN 50665 SAR.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Bay Area Compliance Laboratories Corp. (Shenzhen) test report for TP-Link Archer C64 RF exposure evaluation against EN IEC 62311:2020 and EN 50665:2017.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to demonstrate compliance of the EUT with EN IEC 62311:2020 and EN 50665:2017 RF exposure requirements.
keyPoints: Sample description is AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router, model Archer C64.
Test result is Pass in the configuration tested.
Nearest safety distance between human and antenna is 0.2 m.

entities.name: AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router
entities.evidence: Product Type: AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router

concepts.name: Human exposure to electromagnetic fields
concepts.evidence: Generic standard to demonstrate the compliance of electronic and electrical apparatus with the basic restrictions related to human exposure to electromagnetic fields (0 Hz–300 GHz)

concepts.name: Far Field Calculation Formula
concepts.evidence: Test method Far Field Calculation Formula

concepts.name: Nearest safety distance
concepts.evidence: To meet the requirement of the RF Exposure, the nearest safety distance between human and the antenna is 0.2m.

concepts.name: Equipment under Test
concepts.evidence: Product Description for Equipment under Test (EUT)

evidence.claim: The document is a test report for report number 2501T32449E-RF.
evidence.evidenceText: TEST REPORT Applicant/Manufacturer: TP-Link Systems Inc. Address: 10 Mauchly, Irvine, CA 92618 Report Number: 2501T32449E-RF

evidence.claim: The tested product is an AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Type: AC1200 MU-MIMO Wi-Fi Router

evidence.claim: The tested model is Archer C64.
The document revision history identifies revision 0 as the original report dated 2025-06-19.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision Number Report Number Description of Revision Date of Revision 0 2501T32449E-RF Original Report 2025-06-19

evidence.claim: The test standards are EN IEC 62311:2020 and EN 50665:2017.
The EUT complied with the referenced standards in the tested configuration.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Result: Pass▲ ▲ In the configuration tested, the EUT complied with the standards above.

evidence.claim: The objective was to determine compliance of the EUT with EN IEC 62311:2020 and EN 50665:2017.
evidence.evidenceText: The objective is to determine the compliance of EUT with EN IEC 62311:2020 & EN 50665:2017.

evidence.claim: The 2.4G Wi-Fi frequency range is 2412-2472 MHz.
The 5G Wi-Fi frequency range is 5150-5250 MHz.
Maximum transmit power EIRP is 19.86 dBm for 2.4G Wi-Fi and 22.81 dBm for 5G Wi-Fi.
evidence.evidenceText: Maximum Transmit Power (EIRP) 2.4G Wi-Fi: 19.86 dBm 5G Wi-Fi: 5150-5250MHz: 22.81dBm
EUT Exercise Software No exercise software was used.

evidence.claim: Each test item followed test standards with no deviation.
evidence.evidenceText: Each test item follows test standards and with no deviation.

evidence.claim: For RF exposure, the nearest safety distance between human and antenna is 0.2 m.
evidence.evidenceText: Conclusion: To meet the requirement of the RF Exposure, the nearest safety distance between human and the antenna is 0.2m.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated; the source names standards and a test laboratory only.
Some applicant-provided information is marked with # and the report states the laboratory is not responsible for its authenticity.
Minor OCR/text quality issues appear in the extracted text, including 'relatedp' and 'aparatus'.
